label: plain_text
text:
Ans.
a) 28, 14,7,22, 11,34, 17,52,26, 13, 40, 20, 10,5, 16, 8,4,2, 1
b) 19,58,29,88,44, 22, 11,34,17,52,26, 13,40,20, 10,5,16,8,4,2,1
Yes we always reach 1.
The even numbers are halved and when we have an odd number we convert it into
an even number by multiplying by 3 and adding 1 so that eventually it can be halved
again. The smallest even number is 2 so we will ;
reach 1 for sure.
